message:
chore(gitignore): add test_dir/ to ignore temporary test directories

The test_dir/ directory is created during integration and manual testing
to hold temporary test fixtures and artifacts. These should not be
tracked in version control as they:
- Contain ephemeral data that varies between test runs
- May include large files that would bloat the repository
- Are machine-specific and not relevant to other contributors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,6 +47,7 @@ temp_*.rs
 # Test artifacts
 proptest-regressions/
 junit.xml
+test_dir/
 
 # Beads
 .beads/*
